table_base_path.title: Table Base Path
table_base_path.description: Base path for AI-Lake tables. Each stream writes to {table_base_path}/{stream_name}/. Supports s3://, gs://, az://, or local paths.

embed_mode.title: Embedding Mode
embed_mode.description: How to produce embeddings from record text.

text_field.title: Text Field
text_field.description: Record field used as embedding input. Supports dot notation for nested fields (e.g. meta.body).

embedding_dim.title: Embedding Dimension
embedding_dim.description: Vector dimensionality — must match the chosen model.

embedding_model.title: Embedding Model Name
embedding_model.description: Stored as ailake.embedding-model Iceberg property for model tracking.

embed_cmd.title: Embed Command (cmd mode)
embed_cmd.description: Shell command. Receives JSON string array on stdin, writes JSON float[][] to stdout.

openai_base_url.title: OpenAI Base URL
openai_base_url.description: Override for compatible endpoints (Azure OpenAI, local proxies).

http_url.title: HTTP Embed URL
http_url.description: OpenAI-compatible POST endpoint. Body: {"model": "...", "input": [...]}; response: {"data": [{"embedding": [...]}]}. Works with Ollama (/v1/embeddings), vLLM, LM Studio, Together.ai, Azure OpenAI, and any OpenAI-compatible server.

http_model.title: HTTP Model Name
http_model.description: Model name sent in the request body. Example: nomic-embed-text, mxbai-embed-large. Leave empty to omit.

http_auth_header.title: HTTP Authorization Header
http_auth_header.description: Full value of the Authorization header. Example: Bearer sk-... Leave empty for unauthenticated endpoints (e.g. local Ollama).

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Records per embed API call and per write_batch call.

pre_normalize.title: Pre-normalize Vectors
pre_normalize.description: Normalize to unit L2 at write time. Recommended for cosine metric.

pq_only.title: PQ-only (Discard Raw Vectors)
pq_only.description: Maximum compression — raw F16 vectors discarded after index build. No reranking.
